decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 8/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 268/8808 lines reworked (3.0%, 20/50). 0/126 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 7.9% (2/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 37. Session 8: 42 (process:20 efficiency:14 ttfw:8). Session 9: 43 (process:20 efficiency:16 ttfw:7). Session 10: 40 (process:20 efficiency:15 ttfw:5). Session 11: 26 (process:20 efficiency:5 ttfw:1). Session 12: 32 (process:20 efficiency:8 ttfw:4).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 384/384 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
